description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs, linux and windows, each running on ubuntu-latest and windows-latest respectively. For each job, use a matrix strategy to run multiple configurations, including Ubuntu Clang, Ubuntu GCC, Windows MSVC, and Windows MinGW. For each configuration, check out the code, update the environment, install the Vulkan SDK, configure CMake, build the project, and upload the resulting artifact.
